meaning: n.一种长大衣,大型沙发椅的一种
examples: In 1755 British writer Samuel Johnson published an acerbic letter to Lord Chesterfield rebuffing his patron for neglecting and declining support.
In 1755 British writer Samuel Johnson published an acerbic letter to Lord Chesterfield rebuking his patron for neglect and declining further support.
To Chesterfield, singular focus was not merely a practical way to structure one's time; it was a mark of intelligence.
In its first year the centre took patients from across Nottinghamshire and the Chesterfield area.
In another upset in the region Tony Benn's former Chesterfield constituency fell to the Liberal Democrats.
